creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 174980
faenza.diff

Currently x11-themes/gtk-equinox-engine cannot be build because x11-themes/gnome-icons-faenza is marked as broken because of Google Code going away.  This switches the port to use the Debian mirrors for fetching and updates to 1.3.1.

https://packages.debian.org/source/jessie/faenza-icon-theme

portlint ok, poudriere build on FreeBSD 10.3/amd64 ok
